title: The Process of Setting SMART Objectives in Software Engineering
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential and iterative process for defining effective project objectives using the SMART criteria.
relationships: Defining the project vision leads to drafting an initial objective
The initial objective is evaluated against each SMART criterion (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound)
If the objective fails a criterion, it is refined and re-evaluated
Once all criteria are met, the validated objective is integrated into the project management plan
